channel.title: Known-Plaintext on bBG — CTF Writeups
channel.description: Recent content in Known-Plaintext on bBG — CTF Writeups

item.title: Shuffled OX — Known-Plaintext Attack on Random Alphabet Substitution
item.description: Recover a random alphabet permutation through a known-plaintext oracle, then decrypt an encrypted flag.

item.title: EFF — AES-CTR with 2-Byte Per-Block Nonce Brute-Force
item.description: Brute-force the 2-byte per-block nonce in a non-standard AES-CTR mode to recover each flag character from a known-structure plaintext.
